The 2019 Honda Accord Sedan Sport 1.5T CVT is a perfect blend of style, performance, and functionality. The cabin is thoughtfully designed with quality materials and intuitive technology, ensuring that both the driver and passengers experience comfort and convenience throughout their journey. Under the hood, the 2019 Honda Accord Sport houses a robust 1.5L 4-cylinder engine, which provides a balanced combination of power and efficiency. Paired with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), this sedan ensures a smooth and responsive driving experience, whether you're cruising on the highway or navigating city streets. The Sport trim elevates the Accord's performance with features such as paddle shifters and a sport-tuned suspension, delivering an engaging driving experience for enthusiasts. Additionally, the vehicle's impressive fuel economy ensures that you can enjoy extended road trips without frequent stops at the pump. This model doesn’t compromise on safety or infotainment, boasting a suite of advanced features designed to keep you connected and protected. Standard on the Sport trim are Honda Sensing® technologies, which include adaptive cruise control and lane-keeping assist, delivering peace of mind during your travels. The Accord’s infotainment system, highlighted by a user-friendly touchscreen, seamlessly integrates with smartphone apps, allowing you to stream music and access navigation with ease. Bright, sporty and ready to drive this 2017 Honda Accord Sport in Lunar Silver Metallic combines everyday comfort with a fun-to-drive spirit. Under the hood sits the lively 2.4L inline-4 that produces 189 hp and 182 ft-lb of torque, delivering strong, responsive performance while still returning an efficient 26 MPG city and 34 MPG highway. The exterior's clean silver finish looks sharp against the Black leather/cloth interior, which pairs sporty bolstering with comfortable materials for daily commuting or longer road trips.  
  
Factory-equipped features (standard from the factory)  
- Performance & chassis: 2.4L i-4 engine, sport-tuned suspension and styling cues for a more engaging drive; available with a smooth automatic transmission or 6-speed manual depending on original configuration.  
- Exterior styling: 18-inch alloy wheels, aggressive front bumper and grille treatments, dual exhaust finishers and subtle rear spoiler accents that give the Sport its athletic look.  
- Comfort & convenience: supportive front seats with leather/cloth upholstery, 60/40 split-folding rear seat for extra cargo flexibility, power windows and door locks, cruise control, and a tilt/telescoping steering column.  
- Infotainment & connectivity: center touchscreen with AM/FM audio, Bluetooth HandsFreeLink and audio streaming, USB input(s) for device charging and music playback, and steering-wheel mounted audio and phone controls for safer operation on the road.  
- Climate & interior features: efficient automatic climate control, center console storage, comfortable front armrests and thoughtfully placed cupholders.  
- Safety & security: comprehensive airbag system, anti-lock braking (ABS), Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) with traction control, Brake Assist, tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS) and a factory rearview camera to help with backing and parking maneuvers.  
  
This Accord Sport is in excellent overall condition and comes with a clean CARFAX report, so you can feel confident about its history. Cheerful, efficient and nicely appointed this Accord Sport is a great pick for someone who wants everyday practicality with a sporty edge. Come take it for a drive and see how well it fits your lifestyle!

**Frequently Asked Questions**  
  
**Do I really need to call first, can I just take my chances and hope the vehicle is there?**  
  
If youre seeing this ad, it is likely that the vehicle IS for sale within the Autonation network. Our intent is to prevent you from showing up after the vehicle has been moved. Give us a call, let us physically touch it and confirm its availability. Well provide the local dealership name and address so that you dont waste your time.  
  
**This post is almost 30 days old. Surely you don't still have this vehicle, do you?**  
  
If the post still has a phone number, we almost certainly still have the vehicle at one of your local Autonation dealerships. Simply dial the number above and we'll be happy to point you to the correct store. We may even bring the vehicle to a store near you.  
  
**You say you help people with less than perfect credit, are you a Buy Here - Pay Here lot?**  
  
No. We are not a buy here - pay here lot. However, because we are the largest retailer of New and Used vehicles in the U.S. we have access to banks and credit unions that can be a tremendous benefit to extremely challenged credit.  
  
**Can I really secure financing with zero down payment?**  
  
Many customers actually take delivery without a checkbook or credit card. While this isn't a possibility in every situation, it is often an option when transacting with an Autonation dealership.  
  
**Do you take trade-ins?**  
  
Yes. We need to buy cars from customers every day because of the huge demand in the used vehicle market. It isn't necessary for you to buy a vehicle either. We'd love to purchase your vehicle regardless of age or mileage in most cases.  
  
**What if I want to trade in my vehicle but still owe more than it's worth.**  
  
This is another very common situation that usually won't prevent you from trading your vehicle and taking delivery of your next New or PreOwned vehicle.  
  
**Are you guys really 1price? Won't you negotiate?**  
  
We've found that every single customer wants our bottom-line best price up front. Imagine going to a dealership and telling them "don't tell me your best price, instead, keep going back and forth to your manager and waste as much of my time as possible, until we finally find your best price, and then try to guilt me into buying because you spent so much time with me". If that's actually what you want, you may need help.

The 2019 Honda Accord Sport also features a state-of-the-art infotainment system, with a large touchscreen display and access to Apple CarPlay and Android Auto.

But don't let the sporty exterior fool you, the 2019 Honda Accord Sport is also practical and efficient. With an impressive fuel economy of 30 mpg in the city and 38 mpg on the highway, this sedan is perfect for everyday commuting or long road trips.

Safety is a top priority with Honda, and the Accord Sport is no exception. It comes equipped with a variety of advanced safety features such as lane departure warning, adaptive cruise control, and a rearview camera.

2021 Honda Accord LX — Crystal Black Pearl exterior / Black premium cloth interior  
  
Overview  
This 2021 Honda Accord LX combines efficient turbocharged performance with a spacious, refined cabin and a long list of factory-installed safety and convenience features. Powered by Honda’s 1.5L Turbocharged inline-4 producing 192 horsepower and 192 lb-ft of torque, the Accord LX delivers a balanced blend of everyday responsiveness and excellent fuel economy — an EPA rating of approximately 30 MPG city and 38 MPG highway. Finished in a deep Crystal Black Pearl exterior with Black premium cloth upholstery, this particular example is in excellent overall condition, carries a clean CARFAX report, and shows a single previous owner.  
  
Exterior  
The Crystal Black Pearl paint presents beautifully on the Accord’s sculpted bodywork. The LX trim features Honda’s clean, aerodynamic design language with crisply defined character lines and a broad stance that projects stability and sophistication. Exterior equipment includes power side mirrors, a handsomely integrated rear trunk spoiler, and clear-lens lighting elements. The front fascia and grille are designed to provide both a modern appearance and improved airflow. Wheels are appropriately scaled to the LX trim, contributing to a comfortable ride and confident handling. Overall exterior condition on this vehicle is excellent, with well-maintained paint and trim showing normal, low-wear use for its model year.  
  
Interior and Comfort  
Step inside to a practical and comfortable cabin trimmed in Black premium cloth. The seating is supportive and designed for long-distance comfort for up to five occupants. Front seats offer good bolstering, and the driver’s position includes an adjustable steering column (tilt and telescoping) for a customized driving posture. Rear passengers benefit from generous legroom and a 60/40 split-folding rear seat that enhances cargo versatility. Interior materials are thoughtfully selected for durability and ease of maintenance, with contrast stitching and tasteful trim accents that elevate perceived quality.  
  
Convenience and Storage  
The Accord LX is equipped with a number of everyday convenience features straight from the factory: power door locks and power windows with one-touch up/down driver window functionality, remote keyless entry, and a multi-function center console with storage cubbies and cupholders. The trunk delivers ample cargo capacity for the class (approximately 16.7 cubic feet), plus easy access via a wide opening and low liftover height — making grocery runs, luggage loading and the occasional bulky item straightforward.  
  
Infotainment and Connectivity  
Factory infotainment equipment provides modern smartphone integration and simple, intuitive controls. The system includes a responsive touchscreen interface with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility to mirror familiar apps and nav

I bought this 2007 Honda Accord SE model a couple years ago with low miles of 133,000 miles now it has 149,149 miles. This is my fifth Honda and they all were very reliable, with low maintenance costs, and great gas mileage. It has a fuel efficient four cylinder gas ( it uses a timing chain not a belt so do not have to change it every one hundred thousand miles ) motor, a automatic transmission, power sunroof, factory spoiler, cruise control, with cruise control and radio adjustment buttons on the steering wheel, no rips on the seats, power windows, very cold air conditioning, and hot heater, four newish tires, new spark plugs, new air filter, new synthetic oil and oil filter, a new catalytic converter,( I have the receipt ), big trunk, four doors, air bags, tinted windows, power side mirrors, new registration, a professionally installed ( by U-Haul ) trailer hitch with a receiver and ball hitch, two spare tires, and I have the DMV pink slip in my name, it has a salvage title, the previous owner said he replaced the front left fender, I met him at a professional body shop where he worked. The only negative things are I was carrying a moped in the trunk and the exhaust overheated the rubber grip and charred the rear bumper on the bottom right side, so I put white duct tape over it, there is a very small spot of rust on one corner of the sunroof. On 10-15-25 I reduced the price $450.00 from $5500.00 to $5050.00 and on 10-28 I lowered it to $4950.00, and on 11-1 I reduced it to $4850.00, and on 11-4 I reduced it one last time to $4750.00, or best offer over $4650.00, I don’t have to sell this reliable car, I like having a back up car, so I won’t accept your low offer of $4000.00, I could ask more because most Hondas with less than 150k miles in clean condition are hard to find and sell for more, but I need the cash for my A.D.U. garage to house conversation.  
 I also have a 1999 Toyota Tacoma SR5 Prerunner truck, two wheel drive, with 190,000 miles. It has the 2.7 liter ( can last to 350000 to 500000 miles ) four cylinder motor ( more h.p. and torque for towing then the 2.4 liter motor ), a automatic transmission with overdrive ( so you can cruise the free at 2200 rpm and 65 mph ) a extra cab, clean interior, air conditioner  
 , new windshield, new battery, new interior drivers side door latch release, 5 new BF Goodrich off road tires, new spark plugs, new air filter, new synthetic oil and oil filter, and new transmission fluid ( see picture ), a lumber rack, a bed liner, a loud   
 radio with four speakers, new floor mats, and a tow hitch. This motor uses a timing chain so you never have to change it like other motors that use a timing belt. The only negative thing is body damage on the passenger side where the extra cab meets the bed. The little old lady that I bought it from ( who bought it new ) said someone backed into her in a parking lot, so the insurance company paid her off and then she bought it back with a salvage title. The damage is only cosmetic, it drives and brakes straight.  
 So if you want a truck with no body damage and a clean title do not contact me, but if you want a reliable, economical Toyota Tacoma SR5 with under 190,000 miles and a fuel efficient motor call and talk to me. It's $7450.00 I reduced the price $300.00 on 2-15-26. Firm on the price, cash only, no trades, no checks, no PayPal, no Venmo, no Zelle, no meeting halfway. Leave a phone number in your email, or call and talk ( do not text )Andrew from 9 am to 9 pm at [show contact info](# "click to show contact info") .
